notes: HAR-588 redundant orderOpen against a never-closed disposable order; Shopify returns silent success without changing closed/closedAt. The proxy resolves the precondition by forwarding a cold order hydrate (ORDER_LIFECYCLE_HYDRATE_QUERY / OrderManagementDownstreamRead, recorded in upstreamCalls) — no /__meta/seed pre-stage — so closed and closedAt are read live and match strictly. updatedAt is outside the lifecycle hydrate projection, so the no-op returns the proxy's normalized lifecycle timestamp rather than the live one (iso-timestamp tolerance).

expectedDifferences.reason: updatedAt is outside the cold lifecycle hydrate projection, so the local no-op returns a normalized lifecycle timestamp; the redundant open still leaves closed/closedAt unchanged.
